name: read_sheet
description: Read data from a range in a Google Sheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

range.description: The A1 notation range to read (e.g. 'Sheet1!A1:D10').

name: write_sheet
description: Write or update cell values in a Google Sheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

range.description: The A1 notation range to write (e.g. 'Sheet1!A1').

name: append_rows
description: Append new rows to a Google Sheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

range.description: The A1 notation range to append after (e.g. 'Sheet1!A1').

title.description: The title of the new spreadsheet.

sheet_names.description: Optional list of sheet tab names.

name: list_sheets
description: List all sheet tabs inside a Google Spreadsheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

name: get_spreadsheet_info
description: Get metadata about a Google Spreadsheet (title, sheets, row/column counts).

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

name: clear_range
description: Clear all values in a range of a Google Sheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

range.description: The A1 notation range to clear (e.g. 'Sheet1!A1:D10').

name: add_sheet
description: Add a new sheet tab to an existing Google Spreadsheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

title.description: The name for the new sheet tab.

name: delete_rows
description: Delete rows from a Google Sheet by index (0-based).

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

sheet_id.description: The numeric ID of the sheet tab (use list_sheets to find it).

name: find_and_replace
description: Find and replace text across a Google Spreadsheet or a specific sheet.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

sheet_id.description: Optional numeric sheet ID to limit the search to one tab.

name: format_cells
description: Apply formatting (bold, font size, background/text color) to a range of cells.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet (found in the URL).

sheet_id.description: The numeric ID of the sheet tab.

bold.description: Whether to make the text bold.

background_color.description: Dict with r, g, b keys (0.0-1.0) for background color.

text_color.description: Dict with r, g, b keys (0.0-1.0) for text color.
